:HL["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1438761681033-6461ffad8d80?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","image"]
27:["$","$L6",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m9 18 6-6-6-6","key":"mthhwq"}]],"className":"lucide-chevron-right text-stone-300 shrink-0","size":13}]

2a:["$","li","3",{"className":"flex items-center gap-1","children":[["$","$L6",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":"$27:props:iconNode","className":"lucide-chevron-right text-stone-300 shrink-0","size":13}],["$","span",null,{"className":"text-stone-600 font-medium line-clamp-1","children":"Best Music for Focus and Concentration: What the Research Says"}]]}]
2b:["$","div",null,{"className":"bg-white dark:bg-stone-900 rounded-2xl p-6 sm:p-8 mt-4 shadow-lg border border-stone-100 dark:border-stone-800 mb-10","children":[["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 leading-tight mb-5","style":{"fontFamily":"'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif"},"children":"Best Music for Focus and Concentration: What the Research Says"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-wrap items-center gap-4 text-sm text-stone-400","children":[["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/authors/sara-osei","className":"flex items-center gap-2 group","children":[["$","img",null,{"src":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1438761681033-6461ffad8d80?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","alt":"Sara Osei","className":"w-8 h-8 rounded-full object-cover object-top"}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"font-semibold text-stone-700 dark:text-stone-200 text-sm group-hover:text-orange-600 transition-colors","children":"Sara Osei"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-stone-400","children":"Productivity Researcher"}]]}]]}],["$","span",null,{"className":"flex items-center gap-1","children":[["$","$L6",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 6v6l4 2","key":"mmk7yg"}]],"className":"lucide-clock","size":13}]," ","7 min read"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"April 9, 2026"}]]}]]}]
2c:["$","div",null,{"className":"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-10 pb-16","children":[["$","article",null,{"className":"lg:col-span-2","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xl text-stone-600 leading-relaxed mb-10 font-medium pl-4 border-l-4 border-orange-500","children":"Music affects cognition — but not in the simple way that productivity playlists suggest. The wrong music impairs focus significantly. The right choice depends on the task type. This guide covers the science and the practical recommendations."}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"the-research-on-music-and-cognition","children":"The Research on Music and Cognition"}],["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The relationship between music and cognitive performance is more complex than productivity culture suggests. The question is not whether music helps — it is which type of music, for which type of task, at which point in the work session."}}],["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The core finding from cognitive psychology: <strong>music with lyrics impairs language-based tasks</strong>. Reading, writing, editing, coding — any task that requires processing language — is measurably worse when performed to music with intelligible lyrics. The language processing centres of the brain are engaged by lyrics in a way that directly competes with language tasks."}}],["$","p","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"This is why you feel productive with a favourite playlist but your output quality suffers on writing tasks. The music feels good; the work is worse."}}],["$","h2","4",{"id":"the-mozart-effect-mostly-myth","children":"The Mozart Effect: Mostly Myth"}],["$","p","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The \"Mozart Effect\" — the claim that listening to classical music improves intelligence — is based on a misread 1993 study that showed a brief, temporary improvement on a specific spatial reasoning task after listening to Mozart. The effect lasted 10–15 minutes, did not transfer to general intelligence, and has not been reliably replicated."}}],["$","p","6",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Classical music is not uniquely cognitively enhancing. It does, however, satisfy the no-lyrics criterion for language tasks, which is genuinely useful."}}],["$","h2","7",{"id":"task-type-determines-the-right-choice","children":"Task Type Determines the Right Choice"}],["$","p","8",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>For writing, reading, editing, coding</strong>: Instrumental only. The genre matters less than the absence of lyrics. Options: classical, lo-fi, ambient electronic, jazz without prominent vocals, video game soundtracks (designed specifically to support sustained focus without distraction)."}}],["$","p","9",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>For numerical or analytical tasks</strong>: Moderate background sound at consistent volume. Moderate noise (~65 dB) has been shown to improve creative thinking and may support certain types of analysis. Coffee shop ambient sound falls in this range."}}],["$","p","10",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>For repetitive or manual tasks</strong>: Music with lyrics is fine and may improve mood and performance. Transcription, data entry, and similar tasks have low language processing demands."}}],["$","p","11",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>For learning new information</strong>: Silence or very quiet ambient sound. Acquiring new concepts requires working memory that competing audio competes with."}}],"$L2d","$L2e","$L2f","$L30","$L31","$L32","$L33","$L34","$L35","$L36","$L37","$L38","$L39","$L3a","$L3b","$L3c","$L3d"]}],"$L3e","$L3f","$L40"]}],"$L41"]}]
42:I[94097,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
43:I[24170,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
44:I[55132,["/_next/static/chunks/0wjbooevnfpw4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js"],"default"]
:HL["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1545987796-200677ee1011?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","image"]
:HL["https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1434030216411-0b793f4b4173?w=1200&h=800&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","image"]
2d:["$","h2","12",{"id":"the-best-focus-music-options","children":"The Best Focus Music Options"}]
2e:["$","h3","13",{"id":"lo-fi-hip-hop","children":"Lo-fi Hip Hop"}]
2f:["$","p","14",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Slow tempo (60–80 BPM), minimal lyrics, consistent rhythm. Specifically designed for studying and work. Available on YouTube (dozens of live streams) and Spotify. The low tempo and non-intrusive production make it genuinely unobtrusive for most people."}}]
30:["$","h3","15",{"id":"ambient-and-brian-eno-style-electronic","children":"Ambient and Brian Eno-Style Electronic"}]
31:["$","p","16",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Ambient music is explicitly designed to be present without demanding attention. Brian Eno's \"Music for Airports\" is the archetype. Modern equivalents: Moby's ambient works, Stars of the Lid, or dedicated ambient playlists on Spotify and Apple Music."}}]
32:["$","h3","17",{"id":"video-game-soundtracks","children":"Video Game Soundtracks"}]
33:["$","p","18",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Specifically designed for the use case of sustained focus without distraction. Composers are explicitly briefed to create music that supports hours of engagement without becoming irritating or demanding. Recommended: Journey, Minecraft, Celeste, or any from the Focus Game Music playlists."}}]
34:["$","h3","19",{"id":"binaural-beats","children":"Binaural Beats"}]
35:["$","p","20",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Tones designed to produce specific brainwave states through the perception of two slightly different frequencies in each ear. The research evidence is inconsistent but the anecdotal following is significant. Apps: Brain.fm (the most scientifically grounded option), Endel, or free options on YouTube. Requires headphones."}}]
36:["$","h3","21",{"id":"brown-noise-and-white-noise","children":"Brown Noise and White Noise"}]
37:["$","p","22",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Non-musical consistent sound that masks environmental noise without engaging the language processing system. Brown noise (lower frequency than white noise) is often preferred for sustained focus work. Available on YouTube, dedicated apps, or a simple fan in the room."}}]
38:["$","h2","23",{"id":"practical-recommendations","children":"Practical Recommendations"}]
39:["$","p","24",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Default for language work</strong>: Lo-fi hip hop or ambient at moderate volume through headphones."}}]
3a:["$","p","25",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Default for analytical work</strong>: Brown noise or coffee shop ambient sound."}}]
3b:["$","p","26",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>For repetitive tasks</strong>: Whatever music you enjoy. This is the one context where lyrics are not a liability."}}]
3c:["$","p","27",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>When you need maximum focus</strong>: Silence. No music outperforms silence for the most cognitively demanding work for most people."}}]
3d:["$","p","28",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The noise-cancelling headphone is the most useful single tool here — it provides silence on demand regardless of the environment. See our <a href=\"/blog/headphones-vs-earbuds-for-work\" class=\"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline font-medium\">headphones guide</a> for the best options."}}]
3e:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 pt-8 border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400","children":"Topic:"}],["$","$L7",null,{"href":"/blog?category=Productivity","className":"text-sm font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-green-50 text-green-700 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity","children":"Productivity"}],[["$","$L7","focus",{"href":"/blog/tag/focus","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","focus"]}],["$","$L7","music",{"href":"/blog/tag/music","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","music"]}],["$","$L7","productivity",{"href":"/blog/tag/productivity","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","productivity"]}],["$","$L7","concentration",{"href":"/blog/tag/concentration","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","concentration"]}],["$","$L7","deep-work",{"href":"/blog/tag/deep-work","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","deep-work"]}]]]}]
3f:["$","$L42",null,{"title":"Best Music for Focus and Concentration: What the Research Says","slug":"focus-music-for-work"}]
40:["$","div",null,{"className":"print:hidden","children":["$","$L43",null,{}]}]
41:["$","aside",null,{"className":"space-y-5 print:hidden","children":[["$","$L44",null,{"items":[{"id":"the-research-on-music-and-cognition","text":"The Research on Music and Cognition","level":2},{"id":"the-mozart-effect-mostly-myth","text":"The Mozart Effect: Mostly Myth","level":2},{"id":"task-type-determines-the-right-choice","text":"Task Type Determines the Right Choice","level":2},{"id":"the-best-focus-music-options","text":"The Best Focus Music Options","level":2},{"id":"lo-fi-hip-hop","text":"Lo-fi Hip Hop","level":3},{"id":"ambient-and-brian-eno-style-electronic","text":"Ambient and Brian Eno-Style Electronic","level":3},{"id":"video-game-soundtracks","text":"Video Game Soundtracks","level":3},{"id":"binaural-beats","text":"Binaural Beats","level":3},{"id":"brown-noise-and-white-noise","text":"Brown Noise and White Noise","level":3},{"id":"practical-recommendations","text":"Practical Recommendations","level":2}]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"bg-white dark:bg-stone-900 rounded-2xl p-6 border border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800","children":[["$","img",null,{"src":"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1438761681033-6461ffad8d80?w=400&h=400&fit=crop&auto=format&q=80","alt":"Sara Osei","className":"w-14 h-14 rounded-2xl object-cover object-top mb-4"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"font-bold text-lg text-stone-900 dark:text-stone-100 mb-0.5","style":{"fontFamily":"'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif"},"children":"Sara Osei"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm text-orange-500 font-medium mb-3","children":"Productivity Researcher"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400 leading-relaxed mb-4","children":"Studies how physical and digital environments affect focus and output. 23:[["$","meta","0",{"charSet":"utf-8"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"viewport","content":"width=device-width, initial-scale=1"}]]
48:I[27201,["/_next/static/chunks/01xlw8hd842-c.js","/_next/static/chunks/0d3shmwh5_nmn.js"],"IconMark"]
20:null
25:[["$","title","0",{"children":"Best Music for Focus and Concentration: What the Research Says"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"description","content":"Music affects cognition — but not in the simple way that productivity playlists suggest. The wrong music impairs focus significantly. The right choice depends on the task type. This guide covers the science and the practical recommendations."}],["$","link","2",{"rel":"manifest","href":"/manifest.webmanifest","crossOrigin":"$undefined"}],["$","link","3",{"rel":"canonical","href":"https://deskbly.com/blog/focus-music-for-work"}],["$","meta","4",{"property":"og:title","content":"Best Music for Focus and Concentration: What the Research Says"}],["$","meta","5",{"property":"og:description","content":"Music affects cognition — but not in the simple way that productivity playlists suggest. The wrong music impairs focus significantly. The right choice depends on the task type. This guide covers the science and the practical recommendations."}],["$","meta","6",{"property":"og:url","content":"https://deskbly.com/blog/focus-music-for-work"}],["$","meta","7",{"property":"og:image","content":"https://deskbly.com/blog/focus-music-for-work/opengraph-image?824d4c096998a180"}],["$","meta","8",{"property":"og:image:type","content":"image/png"}],["$","meta","9",{"property":"og:image:width","content":"1200"}],["$","meta","10",{"property":"og:image:height","content":"630"}],["$","meta","11",{"property":"og:type","content":"article"}],["$","meta","12",{"property":"article:published_time","content":"2026-04-09"}],["$","meta","13",{"property":"article:author","content":"Sara Osei"}],["$","meta","14",{"name":"twitter:card","content":"summary_large_image"}],["$","meta","15",{"name":"twitter:title","content":"Best Music for Focus and Concentration: What the Research Says"}],["$","meta","16",{"name":"twitter:description","content":"Music affects cognition — but not in the simple way that productivity playlists suggest. The wrong music impairs focus significantly. The right choice depends on the task type. This guide covers the science and the practical recommendations."}],["$","meta","17",{"name":"twitter:image","content":"https://deskbly.com/blog/focus-music-for-work/opengraph-image?824d4c096998a180"}],["$","meta","18",{"name":"twitter:image:type","content":"image/png"}],["$","meta","19",{"name":"twitter:image:width","content":"1200"}],["$","meta","20",{"name":"twitter:image:height","content":"630"}],["$","link","21",{"rel":"icon","href":"/icon?c0b95df96f490973","alt":"$undefined","type":"image/png","sizes":"32x32"}],["$","link","22",{"rel":"apple-touch-icon","href":"/apple-icon?f7f63e177608d30c","alt":"$undefined","type":"image/png","sizes":"180x180"}],["$","$L48","23",{}]]
